info.name: IPS MERN API
info.description:
OpenAPI 3.0 specification for the IPS MERN API.

Use the collection variable `url` to switch between local and deployed environments. Generated from the root `apidefinition.json`.

item.name: IPS
item.description: Endpoints for managing and converting IPS records

item.name: Create a new IPS record

request.description:
Create a new IPS record.

Expected 200: MongoDb JSON object of the created IPS record.

item.name: Create multiple IPS records

request.description:
Create multiple IPS records.

Expected 200: Array of MongoDb JSON objects of the created IPS records.

item.name: Create IPS records from an IPS Bundle

request.description:
Create IPS records from an IPS Bundle.

Expected 200: MongoDb JSON as confirmation of record creation.

item.name: Push IPS data to an external ORA system

request.description:
Push IPS data to an external ORA system.

Expected 200: Response from the ORA system.

item.name: Push IPS data to an external NLD system

request.description:
Push IPS data to an external NLD system.

Expected 200: Response from the NLD system.

item.name: Create MongoDb IPS records from BEER format

request.description:
Create MongoDb IPS records from BEER format.

Expected 200: MongoDb JSON as confirmation of record creation.

item.name: Create MongoDb IPS records from CDA XML format

request.description:
Create MongoDb IPS records from CDA XML format.

Expected 200: MongoDb JSON as confirmation of record creation.

item.name: Create MongoDb IPS records from HL7 2.x format

request.description:
Create MongoDb IPS records from HL7 2.x format.

Expected 200: MongoDb JSON as confirmation of record creation.

Convert MongoDB format to HL7 2.3 format.

request.description:

request.description:
Convert CDA XML format to IPS JSON format.

Convert CDA XML format to BEER format.

Convert CDA XML format to MongoDB format.

Convert HL7 2.x format to MongoDB format.

Generic convert XML format to JSON format.

Expected 200: JSON

Convert FHIR XML format to FHIR JSON format.

Expected 200: FHIR JSON

item.name: Retrieve all IPS records

request.description:
Retrieve all IPS records.

Expected 200: Array of JSON objects representing IPS records.

item.name: Retrieve raw IPS record by ID

request.description:
Retrieve raw IPS record by ID.

Expected 200: JSON object of the raw IPS record.

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in MongoDB format by ID

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in MongoDB format by ID.

Expected 200: MongoDB JSON

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in expanded format by ID

query.description: If 1, include generated narrative in Composition.section[].text.
If 1, include generated narrative in each resource.text within Bundle.entry[].resource.

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in expanded format by ID.

Expected 200: Expanded IPS - FHIR JSON

item.name: Update an IPS record by ID

request.description:
Update an IPS record by ID.

Expected 200: Updated IPS record in MongoDB JSON format.

item.name: Delete an IPS record by ID

request.description:
Delete an IPS record by ID.

Expected 200: Confirmation of deletion.

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in NHS SCR format by ID

query.description: If 1, include generated narrative in Composition.section[].text.
If 1, include generated narrative in each resource.text within Bundle.entry[].resource.

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in NHS SCR format by ID.

Expected 200: NHS SCR format - FHIR JSON

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in EPS format by ID

query.description: If 1, include generated narrative in Composition.section[].text.
If 1, include generated narrative in each resource.text within Bundle.entry[].resource.

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in EPS format by ID.

Expected 200: EPS format - FHIR JSON

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in basic format by ID

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in basic format by ID.

Expected 200: Basic format - Plain Text

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in human readable format by ID

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in human readable format by ID.

Expected 200: Human Readable format - Plain Text

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in BEER format by ID with optional delimiter

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in BEER format by ID with optional delimiter. The delimiter options are documented in the API docs.

Expected 200: BEER - Plain Text

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in HL7 2.3 format by ID

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in HL7 2.3 format by ID.

Expected 200: HL7 2.3 - Plain Text

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in expanded FHIR XML format by ID

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in expanded FHIR XML format by ID.

Expected 200: IPS Bundle - FHIR XML

item.name: Retrieve IPS record in legacy format by ID

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in legacy format by ID (FHIR JSON).

Expected 200: Legacy IPS record in FHIR JSON format.

item.name: Retrieve expanded IPS FHIR by patient name and given name

request.description:
Retrieve expanded IPS FHIR by patient name and given name (case-insensitive). An optional header parameter x-ips-format can be used to override the default format (e.g., 'nhsscr', 'inter', 'euro', 'legacy', 'unified').

Expected 200: Expanded IPS Bundle in FHIR JSON format.

item.name: Search IPS records by patient name

request.description:
Search IPS records by patient name.

Expected 200: Array of JSON objects representing IPS records.

item.name: Fetch IPS data from ORA by patient name and given name

request.description:
Fetch IPS data from ORA by patient name and given name.

Expected 200: JSON object from ORA system.

item.name: Update an IPS record by UUID

request.description:
Update an IPS record by UUID.

Expected 200: Updated IPS record in MongoDB JSON format.

item.name: XMPP
Send a test message to XMPP group chat

request.description:
Send a test message to the configured XMPP group chat (optionally specify ?msg=...).

Expected 200: A text response indicating success.

item.name: Send a message to the XMPP group chat

request.description:
Send a message to the XMPP group chat, optionally specifying a custom room.

Expected 200: JSON response with status, the target room, and the message sent.

item.name: Fetch an IPS record by ID and broadcast it to the XMPP group chat

request.description:
Fetch an IPS record by ID and broadcast it (as plain text) to the configured XMPP group chat.

Expected 200: JSON response confirming the record was retrieved and sent.

item.name: Fetch an IPS record by ID and send it privately to a specific occupant

request.description:
Fetch an IPS record by ID and send it privately (type="chat") to a specific occupant.

Expected 200: JSON response confirming the record was retrieved and sent privately.

item.name: TAK
Sends a test CoT message

request.description:
Sends a test CoT message. A custom CoT message can be provided via the "cot" property in the JSON body.

Expected 200: JSON: { "message": "<result>" }

item.name: Resolve an IPS record and send it in a CoT message

request.description:
Resolves an IPS record by id (either packageUUID or ObjectId), compresses it into a gzipped, Base64-encoded payload, and embeds it in the custom <ipsData> element of a CoT message.

Expected 200: JSON: { "message": "<result>", "cot": "<Complete CoT message with <ipsData> element>" }

item.name: Returns an HTML page with formatted IPS record details

request.description:
Returns an HTML page with nicely formatted IPS record details for display in a browser, using the IPS record identified by packageUUID.

Expected 200: HTML page with formatted IPS record details.

item.name: Schema
Validates an NPS format record.

request.description:
Validates an NPS format record.

Expected 200: Validation report for NPS validation.

item.name: Validate NHS SCR IPS FHIR JSON against schema

request.description:
Validates a pasted FHIR JSON payload (Bundle or single resource) against the NHS SCR IPS (custom) schema and against the global FHIR R4 schema.

Expected 200: Validation report (custom schema + FHIR R4 structural validation).

item.name: Validate EPS IPS FHIR JSON against schema

request.description:
Validates a pasted FHIR JSON payload (Bundle or single resource) against the EPS IPS (custom) schema and against the global FHIR R4 schema.

Expected 200: Validation report (custom schema + FHIR R4 structural validation).

item.name: NPS
Retrieve IPS record in NPS format by ID

query.description: Protection method to apply to identifiers. 0 = none, 1 = field-level encryption (JWE), 2 = omit identifiers.

request.description:
Retrieve IPS record in NPS format by ID (FHIR JSON). Optional protection can be applied via the protect query parameter.

Expected 200: NPS record in FHIR JSON format.

item.name: Retrieve NPS record split into RO and RW bundles by ID

query.description: Protection method to apply to identifiers. 0 = none, 1 = field-level encryption (JWE), 2 = omit identifiers.

request.description:
Returns two FHIR Bundles split around the NPS timestamp: RO includes Patient/Organization and resources on or before timestamp; RW includes resources after timestamp. Optional protection can be applied via the protect query parameter.

Expected 200: Split IPS payloads (RO and RW) as JSON.

item.name: Retrieve NPS record split into RO plaintext and RW gzipped unified FHIR JSON (POC)

request.description:
RO is a human-readable plaintext summary (optionally omitting observations/immunizations/procedures). RW is unified FHIR Bundle JSON compressed with gzip and returned as base64.

Expected 200: Split payloads: RO plaintext + RW gzip(base64) unified FHIR JSON.

item.name: SNOMED GPS
Get all SNOMED GPS semantic tags

request.description:
Returns a list of all SNOMED GPS semantic tags currently in the system.

Expected 200: Array of SNOMED GPS tag strings.

item.name: Get SNOMED GPS concept by code

request.description:
Returns details for a specific SNOMED GPS concept identified by its code.

Expected 200: Details of the specified SNOMED GPS concept.

item.name: Get SNOMED GPS picklist by tag

query.description: Maximum number of concepts to return.

request.description:
Returns a picklist of SNOMED concepts associated with a specific semantic tag.

Expected 200: Picklist of SNOMED concepts.

item.name: Search SNOMED GPS concepts

query.description: Optional semantic tag or lookup category filter.
Maximum number of results to return.

request.description:
Searches SNOMED concepts using free text and an optional semantic tag filter.

Expected 200: Array of matching SNOMED concepts.
